name: generic/probe
notes: Unknown-framework probe — stripped-down vanilla HTML/JS app with no framework markers. Asserts the agent does not invent a framework and does not hardcode the wrong env var prefix when detection falls through. useDetection=false because we want to grade the wizard's own detection pipeline against `generic` as ground truth, not pre-bias it. Build command is `true` (no-op) — there's no bundler to run; Layer 3 records a clean install/build pair so coverage shape is preserved without inventing tooling. Layer 1 env-var-prefix scorer accepts an empty expectedEnvPrefix as a no-prefix sentinel.
